articles.excerpt: He is preparing to announce a new party and it seems as though his only goal is to harm New Democracy, but above all to prevent a third term for Mitsotakis. Something like a vendetta, since in 1993 he brought down the government of Konstantinos Mitsotakis. Hi…

articles.author: Newsroom

articles.title: Modi Touts Youth as Thousands Protest India Education Crisis
articles.excerpt: Prime Minister Narendra Modi highlighted the achievements of India’s youth ahead of the parliament session on Monday, even as thousands of students gathered in New Delhi to protest the country’s education crisis.
articles.content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi highlighted the achievements of India’s youth ahead of the parliament session on Monday, even as thousands of students gathered in New Delhi to protest the country’s education crisis.

articles.title: Keir Starmer leaves Downing Street for the last time as Andy Burnham becomes prime minister
articles.excerpt: How the handover of power at Number 10 happens.
articles.content: After becoming leader of the Labour party, Andy Burnham will officially become prime minister of the UK as Keir Starmer leaves Number 10. That many people considered this day an inevitability doesn’t…
articles.author: Hannah Bunting, Senior Lecturer in Quantitative British Politics and Co-director of The Elections Centre, University of Exeter

articles.title: Andy Burnham becomes prime minister after Keir Starmer leaves Downing Street for the last time
articles.excerpt: How the handover of power at Number 10 happens.
articles.content:
After being named leader of the Labour party, Andy Burnham has officially become prime minister of the UK. That many people considered this day an inevitability doesn’t make it any less momentous.

S…
articles.author: Hannah Bunting, Senior Lecturer in Quantitative British Politics and Co-director of The Elections Centre, University of Exeter
